basic_info.title: Final Fantasy VII
basic_info.review: Widely regarded as one of the greatest and most influential video games ever made, revolutionizing the RPG genre and popularizing JRPGs in Western markets.

alternative_names: ファイナルファンタジーVII

play_today.details: The definitive way to play Final Fantasy VII. The 2025 Steam release includes native controller support, cloud saves, and full mod compatibility via 7th Heaven mod manager. Use mods for 60 FPS, widescreen, HD textures, voice acting, and improved audio for the ultimate experience.

recommended_patches.name: 7th Heaven Mod Manager
recommended_patches.description: Essential mod manager that virtualizes game files and loads mods on the fly without modifying originals. Required for installing most other mods.

recommended_patches.name: 60/30 FPS Gameplay
recommended_patches.description: Removes the 15 FPS cap in FMVs and 30 FPS cap in battles, enabling smooth 60 FPS gameplay throughout. Created by Vertex2995, Obesebear, and Kaldarasha.

recommended_patches.name: Cosmos Limit Break
recommended_patches.description: True widescreen support with AI-assisted outpainting that fills black bars with upscaled background content. Provides genuine widescreen experience beyond simple stretching.

recommended_patches.name: FF7Music / VGMStream
recommended_patches.description: Replaces MIDI soundtrack with high-fidelity remastered audio and accurate PSX audio emulation. Configurable via 7th Heaven's Music Option setting.

recommended_patches.name: Ninostyle Battle Models
recommended_patches.description: High-quality HD character models for battles. Replaces original low-poly sprites with detailed 3D models while maintaining the original art style.

recommended_patches.name: SYW Unified Textures
recommended_patches.description: AI-upscaled HD textures and backgrounds for every element including fields, menus, fonts, spells, and minigames. Significantly improves visual clarity.

recommended_patches.name: Cosmos Gaia
recommended_patches.description: Adds analog movement, real-time lighting, and improved particle effects to the overworld fields for enhanced immersion.

recommended_patches.name: TrueMotion 2 Codec
recommended_patches.description: Required codec for playing FMVs without black screens on modern Windows systems. Essential for proper video playback.

recommended_patches.name: Cosmos FMV
recommended_patches.description: Replaces baked-in character models in select FMVs with updated versions. Improves visual quality in cutscenes.

recommended_patches.name: Voice Acting Mod
recommended_patches.description: Adds unofficial English voice acting to the game for enhanced immersion. Various voice acting mods available in the catalog.

play_today.details: Official PSN remaster with updated controls, trophy support, and improved loading times. Most accessible console version with no setup required. Includes quality-of-life improvements like quick travel.
Same remaster as PS4 version with additional convenience features including save states, photo mode, and improved UI. Ideal for portable play on Switch.
Mobile port of the original game with touch controls and cloud save support. Good for casual play but lacks the modding capabilities of PC.
Original PlayStation version running on modern systems via emulator. Best for purists wanting the authentic 1997 experience with optional enhancements.

description.synopsis: Cloud Strife, a former member of Shinra's elite SOLDIER unit turned mercenary, joins the eco-terrorist group AVALANCHE to fight against the megacorporation Shinra Electric Power Company, which is draining the planet's life essence known as Mako Energy. As the story unfolds, Cloud must confront the truth about his fractured identity while pursuing the enigmatic Sephiroth, who seeks to summon the meteorfall and merge with the planet's healing Lifestream.
key_features: Innovative Materia system for deep character customization and magic/ability progression
Active Time Battle (ATB) system combining turn-based strategy with real-time elements
Cinematic storytelling using groundbreaking full-motion video (FMV) cutscenes
Iconic character designs by Yoshitaka Amano and legendary soundtrack by Nobuo Uematsu
Branching story elements with multiple side quests and optional content
Limit Breaks - powerful character-specific ultimate attacks
Massive open world to explore including the iconic Midgar city
14 main characters with unique abilities and development arcs
description.long_description: Final Fantasy VII, developed by Square and directed by Hironobu Sakaguchi with production by Hiroyuki Ito, revolutionized the role-playing game genre upon its 1997 release for the Sony PlayStation. The game represented a technical leap forward with its use of 3D character models on pre-rendered backgrounds and extensive full-motion video, setting new standards for cinematic storytelling in video games. The narrative, penned by Kazushige Nojima, explores mature themes of environmentalism, corporate greed, identity, and mortality, resonating with audiences worldwide. The Materia system allowed unprecedented character customization, while the Active Time Battle system refined Square's signature combat mechanics. Composed by Nobuo Uematsu, the soundtrack featuring tracks like 'One-Wing Angel' and 'Aerith's Theme' became instantly iconic. With over 15.3 million copies sold worldwide as of 2025, Final Fantasy VII not only became one of the best-selling games of all time but also credited with boosting PlayStation adoption in North America and popularizing Japanese RPGs globally. The game's success spawned the 'Compilation of Final Fantasy VII' multimedia franchise and a new HD remake trilogy beginning with Final Fantasy VII Remake (2020).
legacy_and_impact: Pioneered the use of full-motion video for narrative storytelling in RPGs, influencing countless subsequent titles
Popularized the Materia customization system, adopted by numerous future RPGs
Credited with establishing the PlayStation as a major gaming platform in North America
Became one of the best-selling games of all time with over 15 million copies sold worldwide
Sparked the Compilation of Final Fantasy VII multimedia franchise including spin-offs, films, and prequels
Launched the Final Fantasy VII Remake trilogy, reimagining the classic for modern audiences
Influenced narrative structures in mainstream gaming through its mature themes and character development
The track 'Aerith's Theme' and 'One-Winged Angel' remain among the most recognizable video game music compositions ever created
Set the standard for environmental storytelling and world-building in RPGs
